title: Department of Information Technology - Our Policy
content:
Department of Information Technology - Our Policy

Institutional information, personnel information, academic research, etc. undertakes to fulfill the obligations required by the laws regarding information security.

It provides the necessary infrastructure and takes the necessary security measures in order to ensure that the IT services used in the realization of corporate activities continue uninterruptedly, and that access to personal and private data can only be accessed by authorized persons.

Information security is constantly evaluated and kept up-to-date on technology developments and the risk factors brought by cybercrime.

All employees and stakeholders are obliged to comply with the Information security policies, and necessary sanctions will be applied within the framework of the relevant legal legislation, university regulations and principles to internal or external individuals and legal institutions that engage in unlawful acts.

This content was updated on 17/09/2024.
